summary: Completed testing of PT (Producto Terminado) integration features. All 7 requested features verified working correctly via backend API tests and frontend Playwright automation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/modelos returns pt_item_id, pt_item_nombre, pt_item_codigo for each modelo
Backend: POST /api/modelos/{id}/crear-pt creates PT item and links to modelo (returns existing if already linked)
Backend: GET /api/items-pt returns only PT type items (2 options: Sin PT asignado, PT-001 - Eduard)
Backend: GET /api/inventario shows items with tipo_item='PT'
Frontend: Modelos dialog Producción tab shows PT selector with 'PT-001 - Eduard' selected
Frontend: Modelos dialog shows 'Crear PT' button (data-testid='btn-crear-pt')
Frontend: Modelos dialog shows 'PT vinculado correctamente' message in green
Frontend: RegistroForm shows 'Artículo PT (Producto Terminado)' label
Frontend: RegistroForm shows 'Auto-completado desde el modelo' text in green
Frontend: RegistroForm PT selector shows 'PT-001 - Eduard' auto-filled from modelo
Frontend: RegistroForm PT selector only shows PT items (Sin artículo PT, PT-001 - Eduard)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py line 2547-2582: crear_pt_para_modelo endpoint correctly creates PT item with codigo PT-XXX format
Backend server.py line 2584-2590: get_items_pt endpoint correctly filters by tipo_item='PT'
Backend server.py line 2094-2096: GET /api/modelos enriches response with pt_item_nombre and pt_item_codigo
Frontend Modelos.jsx line 188-203: handleCrearPT function correctly calls API and updates form state
Frontend Modelos.jsx line 496-529: PT selector and Crear PT button in Producción tab implemented correctly
Frontend RegistroForm.jsx line 254-263: handleModeloChange auto-fills pt_item_id from modelo
Frontend RegistroForm.jsx line 226-228: fetchRegistro auto-fills PT from modelo if registro doesn't have one
Frontend RegistroForm.jsx line 991-1011: PT selector implementation with auto-complete message and filtering
seed_data_creation: Used existing modelo Eduard (3d3f6dd0-bfab-4d79-afe5-2a4cce7f5a87) with PT-001 linked
context_for_next_testing_agent: PT integration fully working. Modelo Eduard has PT-001 linked. The registro form auto-fills PT from modelo when editing. PT selector in RegistroForm filters to only show items with tipo_item='PT'. Key test IDs: select-pt-item, btn-crear-pt, btn-guardar-modelo.
